arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Winner of semi-final favourites to claim Champions League says French expert Frank Leboeuf
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to take on French giants Paris Saint-Germain in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final clash on Tuesday, and they will be difficult to beat.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta & Luis Enrique clash over Arsenal-PSG Champions League tie
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Luis Enrique were speaking ahead of Arsenal's huge Champions League semi-final first leg clash with PSG.

arts.ttl: Calafiori injury status confirmed for Arsenal-PSG Champions League semi-final
arts.sum: Italy international Riccardo Calafiori is still struggling with a knee injury he picked up while...

arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v Arsenal: Désiré Doué to start
arts.sum: Désiré Doué is expected to start ahead of Bradley Barcola on the right of Paris Saint-Germain’s attack as they face Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium in the first leg of…

arts.ttl: Rooming with Ronaldinho and European glory: Revisiting Mikel Arteta’s forgotten spell at PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal and PSG both go searching for long-awaited silverware when they meet in the Champions League semi-final on Tuesday night, with Mikel Arteta needing to overcome the club with whom he won his first European glory

arts.ttl: Arsenal given Champions League warning as PSG semi-final predictions made
arts.sum: ARSENAL VS PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN: Mikel Arteta's side will welcome PSG to the Emirates on Tuesday for the first leg of their Champions League semi-final encounter

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique piled pressure on Mikel Arteta with Arsenal jibe as Gunners face PSG rematch
arts.sum: Luis Enrique will take on Mikel Arteta when PSG face Arsenal in the Champions League semi-final and claimed that the Gunners boss enjoys a notable advantage over him

arts.ttl: Revealed: The positive omen for Arsenal ahead of crunch Champions League semi-final first leg clash with PSG
arts.sum: The Gunners will take on the already-crowned French champions at the Emirates Stadium as they look to make a first Champions League final appearance since losing 1-0 to Barcelona in 2006.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs. PSG: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Arsenal's Champions League semi-final first leg clash with Paris Saint-Germain. Includes how to watch on TV, team news, score prediction and full build-up.

arts.ttl: Arsenal dig deep in search of fine margins required to conquer Paris St-Germain - and ‘write their own history’
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has repeatedly encouraged his side to ‘write their own history’ but knows the players need to be ‘convinced’ they can do it
